title: phyllactis spathulata
intro: Phyllactis spathulata, also known as the 'Globe Mallow', is a flowering plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family, characterized by its vibrant yellow or orange globe-shaped flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Phyllactis spathulata include the potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its possible anti-cancer and antiviral properties. Phyllactis spathulata is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
